title: Universal Fit Standard Issue Law Enforcement Standard Handcuff Key
description:
The ASR Tactical Universal Handcuff Key is a Standard Issue Law Enforcement, Police Handcuff Key which are designed to fit all leading brands of professional handcuffs and restraints. All standard issue police style handcuff keys have a back pin for double-locking handcuffs. This is an essential for personal protection and safety. Extremely durable. Constructed from high grade stainless steel, these handcuff keys are made to be used daily and are the same standard issue hand cuff keys issued by law enforcement.
